heading: Qualifications of persons hired for diplomatic construction program
label: 4854 Qualifications of persons hired for diplomatic construction program
text: In carrying out the diplomatic construction program referred to in , the Secretary of State shall employ as professional staff (by appointment, contract, or otherwise) only those persons with a demonstrated specialized background in the fields of construction, construction law, or contract management. In filling such positions, the Secretary shall actively recruit women and members of minority groups.section 4851(a) of this title
